typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify skill procedure language to explicitly require required skill invocation before substantive reads/edits/command execution, including for documentation-only fix workflows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review report for misc-core-engine-fix-context-read-evidence-guidance noted transcript ordering where reads/edits occurred before required skill invocation while handoff still marked followedProcedure=true.
